component.name: View Materials
component.description: White card with **Unassigned** band (`Foundation/Background/Default` + `Typography/LABEL` secondary), material rows: name + quantity (`Typography/Body` secondary) left, price (`Typography/Body-Bold`) right, `Spacing/16` padding. Consecutive rows in the same group separated by `1px rgba(43,52,65,0.05)`. **Materials Multi Session** adds a top-divided block with `{date} SESSION` band + more rows.

codeProps.sessionBlock: optional; rendered when variant is materialsMultiSession and items.length > 0

notes: 2026-04-07: `ViewMaterialsCard` in `view-materials/` from Figma `1287:618`. Row chrome matches View Notes session headers; no leading icons in reference.
